word: H7739 - שְׁוָה - shᵉvâh - shev-aw' - Make like

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁוה

Transliteration: shevâh

Phonetic: shev-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Pael) to become like
  2. (Ithpael) to be set, be made

Origin: corresponding to H7737, to resemble

TWOT entry: 3023,3024

Part(s) of speech: Verb
